title: colymbada tuntasia
side_effects: Colymbada tuntasia can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea, abdominal cramps, and vomiting. In extreme cases, prolonged use can lead to electrolyte imbalance, fatigue, and even dehydration. Additionally, improper use of the plant may cause allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and respiratory issues like wheezing and shortness of breath. It is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist to ensure safe and proper use of Colymbada tuntasia.
